name: Project.Commander.Feature.SequentialOutputDisplay_Feature
observations: Displays command output in tabs during sequential execution (Print All Nodes)
Architecture: command_output_display_signal routes FBC/RPC→Telnet tab, LOG→BsTool

name: Project.Commander.Method.NodeTreePresenterEmitOutputSignal_Method
observations: Emits command_output_display_signal in handle_command_completed for FBC/RPC tokens

name: Project.Commander.Method.CommanderWindowHandleSequentialOutput_Method
observations: Routes sequential command output to appropriate tab based on token type

name: Global.Pattern.UI.DualExecutionPathUnification_Pattern
observations: Pattern: Unify UI updates across manual and sequential execution paths via signal routing
Implementation: Sequential path emits same signals manual path uses for consistent behavior
Benefits: Single UI update logic, no code duplication, maintains separation of concerns
